title: Elevate23 NYC IRL ticket needed
excerpt:
I’m looking to attend Elevate23 in person in NYC but it’s fully booked. Looking to see if anyone has an extra ticket or is not planning to attend? 
Thanks, 
William

posts.author: william905 (William Wong)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m looking to attend Elevate23 in person in NYC but it’s fully booked. Looking to see if anyone has an extra ticket or is not planning to attend?

Thanks,

William

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey William,

We will see what we can do about this

In the meantime, would you be interested in attending our NYC Community event instead? Let us know and we can investigate if there are any spare tickets available for you!

posts.author: william905 (William Wong)
posts.cookedHtml: I didn’t know about the NYC community event. I would be interested in checking that out as well. Please let me know the details. Thanks!

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: For sure! Reaching out to you via DM
